name: Career GPS Assessment
description: Reusable 4-step assessment package for Career GPS with landing, intro, assessment, and dashboard result flow.

steps.title: Know where you are today, so you can choose where to go next.
steps.lede: A calm self-assessment that turns four growth stages into a practical dashboard with clear insight, a score, and a next step.
steps.note: Takes a few minutes. No right or wrong answers.

steps.title: Take a quick pause before you begin.
steps.lede: You will move through four focused stages, one question at a time. Add your details if you want your final snapshot to feel more personal.
expectations: Real-time score and summary at the end

steps.title: Answer honestly. The dashboard does the rest.
steps.lede: Move through the steps at your pace and submit when every question is complete.

submitConfirmation.title: Submit assessment and open your dashboard?
submitConfirmation.body: Your answers will be saved in this browser session, then your Career GPS Dashboard will open.

sections.title: Direction
sections.description: Can I make intentional decisions about my future?

questions.text: I have a clear direction for what I want to work toward in the next 12 months.
I make choices that align with my longer-term goals.
I regularly review my priorities before committing time and effort.

sections.title: Visibility
sections.description: Can others understand and recognize my value?

questions.text: I can clearly explain the value I bring in one minute or less.
My profile, portfolio, or public presence reflects my strengths and direction.
People around me can recognize what I am good at and what I am building toward.

sections.title: Capability
sections.description: Can I consistently turn effort into results?

questions.text: I consistently follow through on important tasks and commitments.
I can communicate my ideas clearly in writing or speaking when needed.
I have practical systems that help me turn plans into measurable progress.

sections.title: Amplification
sections.description: Can I use AI and technology to multiply my impact?

questions.text: I use AI or digital tools to improve the quality and speed of my work.
I can choose the right technology for different tasks and goals.
I review and improve technology-assisted outputs before I use or share them.

steps.title: Your Career GPS result is ready.
steps.lede: This is your starting point: a score, a stage, your strongest areas, and the few things most worth improving next.

sections.reflectionPrompt: Based on your Career GPS result, what is one area you want to improve in the next 30 days?

emptyState.title: Complete your assessment first.
emptyState.lede: We could not find a submitted snapshot in this browser session yet.

stages.label: Explorer
stages.message: You are exploring possibilities and building clarity about your future. Primary focus: Direction and Consistency.

stages.label: Builder
stages.message: You have begun taking intentional action and are building foundations for growth. Primary focus: Execution and Visibility.

stages.label: Momentum Builder
stages.message: You have direction and momentum. The next step is making your strengths more visible and amplifying your impact. Primary focus: Visibility and AI leverage.

stages.label: Amplifier
stages.message: You are intentionally using your strengths, systems, and AI to increase your impact. Primary focus: Scaling influence and Creating opportunities.

stages.label: Catalyst
stages.message: You consistently create opportunities, execute effectively, and help others grow. Primary focus: Leadership and Multiplying impact.

recommendationsBySection.direction: Write down one clear 12-month direction and name the three capabilities that would move you toward it fastest.
recommendationsBySection.visibility: Sharpen how you communicate your value. Create a one-line value statement and update one public profile this week.
recommendationsBySection.capability: Pick one weekly system that improves execution, then track your progress for the next 30 days.
recommendationsBySection.amplification: Use AI and technology intentionally for one recurring workflow, and document a repeatable process you can improve over time.

scoring.defaultRecommendation: Pick one area to improve this month, then turn it into a small weekly habit.
